writing.title: Writing Task 1: Describe a gift or purchase
writing.prompt: Write a short paragraph (about 40 words) about something you bought or gave, using buy/bought, think/thought, tell/told, take/took, give/gave.
writing.sampleAnswer: I bought some fruit and a new bag at the market. I thought it was a little expensive, but I bought it anyway. I told my sister, and she gave me some advice.
checklist: Dùng ít nhất 3 động từ bất quy tắc nhóm 2
Không thêm -ed vào các động từ này
Có một câu chuyện rõ ràng, mạch lạc

writing.title: Writing Task 1: Describe a historical place
writing.prompt: Write a short paragraph (about 40 words) about a historical place or event, using build/built, find/found, begin/began.
writing.sampleAnswer: They built this museum about a hundred years ago. I found some old photographs inside. The exhibition began last month, and a lot of visitors came to see it.
checklist: Dùng cả 3 động từ build/find/begin ở dạng quá khứ
Có mốc thời gian lịch sử rõ ràng
Câu văn mạch lạc, đúng ngữ pháp
